reasoning:

Given the short span of time between Oct 30, 2025, and the resolution dates (Nov 16, 2025; Dec 9, 2025; Feb 7, 2026), it is practically impossible that a new vaccine was developed, approved, and updated on Wikipedia in a matter of weeks/months. Therefore, 'No' will remain the value on this Wikipedia page for all three resolution dates. I predict 2% to account for any bizarre wiki-vandalism or extremely rapid unexpected developments.
